message:
Improve type inference in push_items iteration

Make tuple destructuring explicit to help type inference:
- Add explicit JfpPushItem type annotation in map closure
- Split tuple destructuring from for loop into let binding
- Prefix unused variables with underscore

This resolves type inference issues when iterating over complex
tuples with the zip combinator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
